notes: v1.14.129 - STAGE 3 (the big one): Work>Deploy 'Tools' surface — re-homes the legacy ops-tabs into the New UI, clearing the PARITY §7 MISSING-IN-REDESIGN rip-cord blocker. John picked layout Option B (card grid; mock at Downloads/phantom-stage3-tools-mock.html). NEW: (1) deploy_showTools(host) renders a 2-col card grid (BOM/Manifest/PortMap/RackMap/CrashCart/SOPs, .rf-card recipe) + a 'Log a Blocker' quick-action (blocker_quick); (2) deploy_showOpsTool(tab) renders the LIVE OPS_TABS[tab] fn (reuse-don't-rebuild) into deploy_opsHost()=#wk-deploy with a single '‹ Back' (body.ops-detail hides #work-back per Rule A); (3) a ⚙ TOOLS button added to the deploy Command Center header, GATED redesign-only (if(redesign_isOn())) so legacy keeps its #ops-tab-strip — byte-identical; (4) nav_restore handles d:'tools' + d:'tool:<tab>' so history-back steps Tool→Tools→Command Center. showOpsTab itself is UNCHANGED (its .113 _unhomedOps exception still routes those tabs to #ops-content for any legacy/edge caller; the redesign entry is the new Tools surface). Browser-verified at 412x915: CC shows ⚙ TOOLS (redesign) / hidden (?legacy=1); Tools grid = 6 cards + Blocker; all six tools render their live content (BOM ingest, Manifest, PortMap, RackMap viewer input, CrashCart, SOPs CRUD) with a working back; ops-detail single-back; zero console errors. node --check x3 + sw.js, brace gate, three-stamp lockstep. NEXT: Stage 4 (BUILD-2 quirk-injection / BUILD-1 already shipped as the Ask card), Stage 5 (demote legacy chrome), Stage 6 (rip-cord retirement, gated on clean field shifts). DEVICE-VERIFY: Work>Deploy > ⚙ TOOLS > open each of BOM/Manifest/Port Map/Rack Map/Crash-Cart/SOPs (content loads, back returns to the grid); Log a Blocker works; ?legacy=1 deploy dashboard has NO Tools button and the legacy ops-tab strip is unchanged.
